name: Hourly shelf-stock check
description: No webhook source — run on a schedule. Every hour, pull a still frame from a retail camera, ask Gemini how full the shelf or rack is, and post the percentage to Helix so Verkada Command can alert floor staff when stock drops.
summary: Hourly schedule → Gemini still-image analyze (JSON) → Helix event with Stock Level

config.prompt:
Estimate how full the shelf or clothing rack in this image is on a scale of 0-100, where 100 is fully stocked and 0 is empty.

Respond with ONLY a JSON object — no prose, no code fence — with one integer key:
  "stock_level": integer 0-100.

Example: {"stock_level": 65}
